name: Phrogging: Hider in My House
overview: Explores the phenomenon of phrogging – people secretly living inside someone else’s home and features two first-hand accounts of survivors sharing the most skin-crawling, twisted and truly terrifying stories imaginable. Along with interviews and key archive materials, cinematic recreations bring the clues and confrontations to life.

trailers.title: Sneak Peek | Phrogging: Hider in My House | July 18, 2022 | Lifetime
